message:
fix(widgets): refactor virtualized list test for edge case coverage

virtualized.rs:
- Consolidate redundant item struct definitions in test
- Add more items to properly test scroll edge cases
- Fix test setup: need 4+ items for scroll_offset=1 to be valid
- Add comments explaining items_per_viewport and max_offset math
- Remove duplicate render call and buffer clear
- Test now properly validates overscan behavior at terminal top edge

app.rs:
- Minor adjustments to evidence ledger state handling

widget_gallery.rs:
- Update widget gallery demo to use new virtualized list API

The test refactoring ensures the off-screen skip logic is properly
exercised with a valid item count and scroll configuration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
